title: Astrocyte Isolation and Transfection for Astrocytes/Neuron Co-Culture Assay
author: Justin T Savage
materials: Prepare the following solutions (enough for 9 pups) %s %s Tube Label DPBS # of Aliquots + Additive Notes Lo OVO 36ml 2 2ml aliquot Add 400µl DNase before use Hi OVO 20ml 2 2ml aliquot BSA Buffer 76ml 2 2ml aliquot Divide among 2 50ml Falcon Tubes Panning (X2 tubes) 45ml 500µl insulin + 5ml BSA buffer Insulin, do not use if >6 weeks’ old
Aspirate off the supernatant with a vacuum.
Warm-up AGM and DPBS in a water bath
Aspirate the DPBS and dislodged cells
Warm up an aliquot of AGM in incubator.

steps.title: Prepare dissection surface by cleaning with...
steps.instruction: Prepare dissection surface by cleaning with ethanol, placing an absorbent pad on the benchtop, and preparing tools. Will need small curved spring scissors, larger scissors for decapitation, and forceps.

steps.title: Prepare 3 60mm dishes adding 5ml...
steps.instruction: Prepare 3 60mm dishes adding 5ml of DPBS to collect 6 cortices each, and one 10cm dish with 12ml of DPBS for the dissection.

steps.title: Decapitate pups and de-skin the heads
steps.instruction: Decapitate pups and de-skin the heads. Remove the skull using small scissors to trim around but above the ears up to the midline. The skull should peel off.

steps.title: Remove the brains and place them...
steps.instruction: Remove the brains and place them into the 10cm dish with DPBS.

steps.title: Using the forces remove meninges and...
steps.instruction: Using the forces remove meninges and dissect the basal ganglia, hippocampus and the cerebella. This will leave isolated cortex.

steps.title: Transfer cortices to a fresh 60mm dish with DPBS
steps.instruction: Transfer cortices to a fresh 60mm dish with DPBS.

steps.title: Chop the cortices with scissors to...
steps.instruction: Chop the cortices with scissors to increase the surface for enzymatic digestion.

steps.title: Resuspend the papain
steps.instruction: Resuspend the papain. And add the DNase.

steps.title: Cut off the tip of sterile...
steps.instruction: Cut off the tip of sterile plastic disposable pipette to make a larger opening.

steps.title: Using the plastic pipette, suck up...
steps.instruction: Using the plastic pipette, suck up the chopped tissue and DPBS. Tap the tip of the pipet onto the papain solution in 20 ml universal tubes without squeezing the pipet or adding liquid. Swirl gently to get a ‘tornado effect’ before letting the brain tissue settle

steps.title: Incubate at 33°C for 45 minutes,...
steps.instruction: Incubate at 33°C for 45 minutes, swirling the tissue at 15-minute intervals.

steps.title: Just before the end of the...
steps.instruction: Just before the end of the papain incubation, add DNase to the Lo Ovo (400ul).

steps.title: Once the 45-minute incubation is completed,...
steps.instruction: Once the 45-minute incubation is completed, aspirate the DPBS from the universal tubes. The tissue will stay at the bottom of the tube.

steps.title: Add 2 ml Lo-Ovo gently by...
steps.instruction: Add 2 ml Lo-Ovo gently by dribbling down the side of the tube. Triturate using a 1ml pipette about 10 passes up and down. Check that there is a single cell suspension, otherwise, 1ml of Lo-Ovo can be added to help in resuspension. Add the remainder of Lo-Ovo to dissociated cells.

steps.title: Centrifuge the cells at 1100rpm for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the cells at 1100rpm for 11 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Aspirate off the supernatant with a...
steps.instruction: Aspirate off the supernatant with a vacuum without disturbing the pellet.

steps.title: Resuspend the cells in 2 ml Hi-Ovo
steps.instruction: Resuspend the cells in 2 ml Hi-Ovo. Triturate using a 1ml pipette about 10 passes. Add the remainder of Hi-Ovo.

steps.title: Centrifuge the cells at 1100rpm for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the cells at 1100rpm for 11 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Prepare Astrocyte Growth Media (AGM) This...
steps.instruction: Prepare Astrocyte Growth Media (AGM) This recipe makes 500ml of filtered astrocyte growth media. Store at 4C. Combine and filter the following reagents: DMEM 450ml FBS 50ml Penstrep (100x) - 5ml Glutamate (100x) - 5ml Sodium Pyruvate (100x) - 5ml Insulin - 5ml N-Acetyl Cysteine - 500µl Hydrocortisone - 500µl

steps.title: Dilute 100µl of PDL in 10ml water
steps.instruction: Dilute 100µl of PDL in 10ml water.

steps.title: Coat 75cm2 culture flasks with 10...
steps.instruction: Coat 75cm2 culture flasks with 10 µg/ml PDL for at least 30 mins at room temperature.

steps.title: Wash 3 times with sterile ddH2O,...
steps.instruction: Wash 3 times with sterile ddH2O, then add 15ml AGM to each flask. Let sit in the incubator with the lid slightly twisted off during prep to let the CO2 levels and temperature equilibrate.

steps.title: Resuspend the cells in 2-3ml warmed AGM
steps.instruction: Resuspend the cells in 2-3ml warmed AGM. Bring up to 10ml. Filter the cell mixture through 20m Nitex membrane 1 mL at a time into a 50ml Falcon tube. Remember to Ethanol/flame sterilize forceps.

steps.title: Centrifuge the filtered cells at 1100rpm...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge the filtered cells at 1100rpm for 10 minutes at room temperature.

steps.title: Aspirate off the supernatant and resuspend...
steps.instruction: Aspirate off the supernatant and resuspend the cells in 2 mL AGM.

steps.title: Bring up the volume to 10ml to count the cells
steps.instruction: Bring up the volume to 10ml to count the cells.

steps.title: Plate cells at very high density
steps.instruction: Plate cells at very high density: 15 million cells per 75cm2 culture flask as a minimum. Better if can be between 17-20 millon. Add the required amount to the prepped flasks.

steps.title: Store in incubator with cap slightly unscrewed
steps.instruction: Store in incubator with cap slightly unscrewed.

steps.title: Check astrocytes for normal morphology under a microscope
steps.instruction: Check astrocytes for normal morphology under a microscope

steps.title: Wash the cells with 10ml DPBS at least 3 times
steps.instruction: Wash the cells with 10ml DPBS at least 3 times

steps.title: Add 15ml of DPBS and shake...
steps.instruction: Add 15ml of DPBS and shake the flasks at least 10 times (this allows for other cell types to detach from the coating).

steps.title: Add another 15ml of DPBS
steps.instruction: Add another 15ml of DPBS. Check under a microscope to see if cell debris and other cells have been dislodged. There should be patches of ‘holes’ into which the astrocytes can grow into. If insufficient, shake more/harder.

steps.title: Add 15ml of AGM
steps.instruction: Add 15ml of AGM

steps.title: Store in incubator
steps.instruction: Store in incubator

steps.title: Warm-up AGM in a water bath and add AraC (1:10000)
steps.instruction: Warm-up AGM in a water bath and add AraC (1:10000)

steps.title: Check astrocytes for normal morphology under a microscope
steps.instruction: Check astrocytes for normal morphology under a microscope

steps.title: Remove old AGM and replace with fresh AGM+AraC (15ml/flask)
steps.instruction: Remove old AGM and replace with fresh AGM+AraC (15ml/flask)

steps.title: Store in the incubator
steps.instruction: Store in the incubator

steps.title: This protocol is for 1 flask of astrocytes
steps.instruction: This protocol is for 1 flask of astrocytes. Scale up accordingly.

steps.title: Warm-up trypsin, AGM and DPBS in a water bath
steps.instruction: Warm-up trypsin, AGM and DPBS in a water bath

steps.title: Dilute 100µl of PDL in 10ml...
steps.instruction: Dilute 100µl of PDL in 10ml water and coat the wells of a 12-well plate with 0.5 ml of 10 µg/ml PDL for at least 30 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Wash 3 times with sterile ddH2O,...
steps.instruction: Wash 3 times with sterile ddH2O, then add 1 ml AGM to every well. Let sit in the incubator during the astrocyte passaging to let the CO2 levels and temperature equilibrate.

steps.title: Remove old AGM media in the flask
steps.instruction: Remove old AGM media in the flask

steps.title: Rinse the flask with PBS without...
steps.instruction: Rinse the flask with PBS without magnesium and calcium 3 times

steps.title: Add 10 ml pre-warmed trypsin to each flask
steps.instruction: Add 10 ml pre-warmed trypsin to each flask. Incubate for 5 minutes at 37˚C in the incubator, lying flat (not stacked) to have even heat.

steps.title: Tap flask to loosen astrocytes and...
steps.instruction: Tap flask to loosen astrocytes and collect with 10ml pipette all the astrocytes that are now are dislodged.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 1
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 1.1 x 1000RPM for 10min to pellet the astrocytes

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet in 2ml of AGM
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet in 2ml of AGM. Pipette up and swirl to dislodge the pellet. Dispense and swirl gently until a cell suspension is achieved.

steps.title: Plate the astrocytes in the 12-well plate at 0
steps.instruction: Plate the astrocytes in the 12-well plate at 0.2 million cells per well.

steps.title: Store in the incubator
steps.instruction: Store in the incubator.

steps.title: To each well in a 12-well,...
steps.instruction: To each well in a 12-well, the following components are added: DNA - 1 ul of 1 ug/ul Plus - 1 ul Optimem - 64 ul

steps.title: Mix all 3 components and let set for 5 min
steps.instruction: Mix all 3 components and let set for 5 min.

steps.title: To another tube, prepare a LTX mixture tube
steps.instruction: To another tube, prepare a LTX mixture tube: 2 ul LTX + 64 ul Optimem/condition tested.

steps.title: Add 66 ul LTX mixture to...
steps.instruction: Add 66 ul LTX mixture to each transfection tube and incubate for 30 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Remove and save 0
steps.instruction: Remove and save 0.5 ml of old AGM. Add 0.5 ml of fresh AGM to the astrocytes and another 0.5 ml of fresh AGM to the saved media.

steps.title: Add 132 ul of DNA/LTX to...
steps.instruction: Add 132 ul of DNA/LTX to each well in a swirl fashion.

steps.title: Incubate 2
steps.instruction: Incubate 2.5h. Warm up an aliquot of DPBS.

steps.title: Wash 3 times with 1 ml of DPBS
steps.instruction: Wash 3 times with 1 ml of DPBS.

steps.title: Add the 1 ml of saved/fresh...
steps.instruction: Add the 1 ml of saved/fresh AGM mixture to each well.

steps.title: Warm up trypsin, DPBS and 10 ml aliquot of AGM
steps.instruction: Warm up trypsin, DPBS and 10 ml aliquot of AGM.

steps.title: Loosen the astrocytes by tapping gently...
steps.instruction: Loosen the astrocytes by tapping gently on the plate after incubation. Transfer into prepared 15 ml tube.

steps.title: Add 1 ml of AGM into...
steps.instruction: Add 1 ml of AGM into fresh 15 ml tube per condition.

steps.title: Add trypsin (0
steps.instruction: Add trypsin (0.5 ml per well for 12-well plate). Incubate for 6 min at 37°C.

steps.title: Aspirate old AGM and wash 3 times with DPBS
steps.instruction: Aspirate old AGM and wash 3 times with DPBS.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 1
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 1.1 x 1000RPM for 10min to pellet the astrocytes

steps.title: Remove medium and resuspend in neuronal medium
steps.instruction: Remove medium and resuspend in neuronal medium.

steps.title: Count and plate 20000 astrocytes to...
steps.instruction: Count and plate 20000 astrocytes to each well of neurons (for neuron isolation protocol, see protocol below). Glia-Free Cortical Neuron Culture by Justin T Savage
